item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 14min Viktor Hovland enters today 1 shot off the lead, playing in the final pairing with Mat
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 14min Viktor Hovland enters today 1 shot off the lead, playing in the final pairing with Matt Fitzpatrick.
Hovland has gained 6.3 strokes putting this week, his most through 36 holes of any tournament in his PGA Tour career. 1 11 2 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 25min #DISCUSSION — If you’ve broken 100, what’s one tip you would give your fellow golfer tryi
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 25min #DISCUSSION — If you’ve broken 100, what’s one tip you would give your fellow golfer trying to do the same? 65 6 34 10 mil

item.title: GolfDigest: Brandel Chamblee reposteó Golf Digest @GolfDigest · 3h Thomas Friedman is a foreign affairs expert with a unique perspec
item.description:
Brandel Chamblee reposteó Golf Digest @GolfDigest · 3h Thomas Friedman is a foreign affairs expert with a unique perspective on how golf was meant to fit into Saudi Arabia's ambitions.
Read more: http:// glfdig.st/BvFN50YLwMC 10 14 34 18 mil

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 33min J.J. Spaun has his distances dialed
Discussion resulting in near perfection as he sticks it
